title: Nexus: error related to optimization around comparison / ccu2.   Includes "equiv" check script.

features.name: unsigned comparison after MSB inversion for signed comparison emulation
features.description: Code should include an unsigned comparison between two values that have their MSB inverted via XOR with 8'h80 to emulate signed comparison

features.name: ternary selection based on comparison result
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional operator selecting between two inputs based on an unsigned comparison result
